equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

title: 2025-11-04 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 29.91
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-11-04: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 29.91/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-11-04, the score printed 29.91/100 in the elevated regime, with front-end rate pressure and equity stress doing most of the work.
